jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Mphasis
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Mphasis in Aurangabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mphasis:
Mphasis is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mphasis!
